role: Test Engineer Intern — Quality & Optimization Excellence
bullets: Joining ADI's Quality and Optimization Excellence team to work on test engineering for analog and mixed-signal ICs — one of the world's leading semiconductor companies for precision measurement and signal processing.
Designed a PCB-based LED driver circuit in Altium Designer — full end-to-end flow: schematic capture, PCB layout, and design verification.
Performed electrical design calculations for current limiting and component derating to ensure reliable operation within device specifications.
Built custom schematic symbols and PCB footprints; integrated vendor STEP models to validate mechanical fit and board-level assembly.
Produced manufacturing-ready deliverables: Gerber files, pick-and-place outputs, and structured BOM for fabrication and assembly review.
Upgraded 20+ client workstations by replacing DDR3 RAM and hardware components, reducing boot and load times by up to 35%.
Diagnosed and resolved hardware failures, driver conflicts, and OS errors across diverse hardware setups.
